rule_triggered: High-value wire to FATF medium-risk jurisdiction
account_history_summary: Account open 3 years. Regular import payments to UAE and India averaging £25k/month. Business registered as food import/export. VAT registered. Last 6 months: 8 similar wires to UAE.

rule_triggered: Cash deposit just below £10,000 reporting threshold
account_history_summary: Account open 8 months. Previously low activity (salary credits, normal retail spend). Last 30 days: 5 cash deposits ranging £8,500-£9,800. Total: £47,100 cash deposited. No business account.

Account open 5 years. Private banking client, introduced by relationship manager. Declared income: property investment and business interests in Kuwait and UAE. Regular quarterly transfers to family office. This transfer is 3x the usual quarterly amount.

rule_triggered: Rapid fund movement: large inflow fragmented into multiple outflows within 24 hours
account_history_summary: Account open 4 months. Registered as payment processing company. £187k received from 3 sources yesterday morning; £185,500 sent to 14 different personal accounts within 6 hours. Average account balance before: £2,300. Directors registered 5 months ago, no trading history visible.

rule_triggered: High-value crypto purchase — first crypto transaction on account
account_history_summary: Account open 2 years. Software engineer, salary £85k/year. No previous crypto activity. Last 3 months: 6 cash withdrawals totalling £12,000. This £35k crypto purchase funded by recent salary credits and £18k transfer from another bank. No explanation on record.

rule_triggered: Large cash deposit at unusual hours (02:00-04:00)
account_history_summary: Account open 1 year. Registered convenience store and off-licence. Cash-intensive legitimate business. Average weekly deposits: £8,000-£12,000 aligned with weekend trade. This deposit at 2am on a Wednesday is unusual in timing and amount.

rule_triggered: Trade finance LC value inconsistent with declared shipment volume
account_history_summary: Account open 6 months. Registered commodity trader. This LC for 'electronics components' valued at $450k. Shipping documents show 2 containers. Industry benchmark for 2 containers of electronics: $80k-$150k. Significant over-invoicing pattern. Second LC this month.

rule_triggered: Large wire from BVI holding company to UK property company
account_history_summary: Account open 2 years. UK property development company. Last transaction 4 months ago (£50k contractor payment). Today: £1.2m received from BVI entity with same 'Sunrise' name. No property purchase on record. No explanation provided. Company director changed 3 weeks ago.

rule_triggered: Personal account receiving multiple small transfers from unrelated individuals
account_history_summary: Account open 3 months. Declared occupation: carer. Salary: £1,800/month. Last 2 weeks: 11 transfers from different individuals ranging £900-£1,800 each, totalling £15,500. No business account registered. Pattern consistent with money mule activity.

rule_triggered: Intra-group transfer — verify legitimate business purpose
account_history_summary: Account open 4 years. FCA-authorised investment management firm (FRN: 784532). Regular quarterly transfers to Frankfurt office (EEA subsidiary). This transfer aligned with quarter-end. German entity on FCA passporting register. Audited accounts on file.
